description: Great experience for our customers, made our life simple by answering the customer queries much faster and in precise.
author: Vidhya N.
pros: Human like interactive chat bot. Ease of doing business.
cons: Nothing that I can think of. I would recommend strongly to do business with inextlabs

author: Rahul M.
pros: As an organization as we grew up we had lots of clients and we had to different types of communications with different types of clients so we needed different channels which we were finding difficult. Inxetlab's whatsapp business message helped us to solve this problem and reduced the human involvement and increased the productivity. And website chatbot helped us to reduce the junk leads because the bot helped the users to understand well about our services and products. The ease of using of the product is really commendable.
cons: Initially we had some issues with the features of the product and some bugs also were there. But the inexlabs team has resolved all those issues in a very short time span.

review_title: A must have for businesses who are looking for WhatsApp automation
description: Ability to send messages to a large group of volunteers and donors whenever a new cause is publishedAbility to get insights on how many messages were delivered and readand more importantly collect and classify responses from the respondents
author: Venky R.
pros: The rich functionality to send automated messages on WhatsApp to volunteers and donors. This broadcast module helps us to raise funding from our donors to support our educational causes, quicker than before.
cons: There were some initial glitches and it took a while for us to understand how WhatsApp template messages work. It would be good to have a demo video in addition to the user manual

description: Good overall. Planning to address our chat requirements

pros: Ability of staff to understand our business requirements

description: Good, all the best to the growing team
